tasks.label: Migrate and run dev server
args: ".venv\Scripts\activate && python manage.py makemigrations users chats files && python manage.py migrate && python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000"

tasks.label: Run backend (SQLite, in-memory Channels)
tasks.command: set USE_SQLITE=1 & set REDIS_URL=memory & call .venv\Scripts\activate.bat & python manage.py runserver
